body_transformation: The segmented body now features soft pastel pink and ivory white bands with delicate lavender undertones, replacing the original yellow and black. Transparent wings are reimagined as translucent, crystalline wings with glowing starlight silver veins and petal gold accents. The stinger transforms into a delicate, glowing orb-like eye with a soft lavender core. White facial markings become star-shaped patterns of shimmering petal gold, while the six legs gain subtle foot pads with a soft, pearlescent sheen. The rounded head retains its shape but now has petal-like ear flaps that shimmer with a faint starlight silver glow.
signature_feature: Wings: crystalline with glowing starlight silver veins and petal gold accents.
